records.name: Access and Functional Needs Advisor
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Air Operations Branch Director (Single Type)
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.

records.name: Access and Functional Needs Advisor
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.

records.name: Air Operations Branch Director (Single Type)
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.

records.name: Chemical Operations Support Specialist (Type 1)
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Community Emergency Response Team (CERT) Section Chief
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.

records.name: Damage Assessment Coordinator
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.

records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.

records.name: Environmental and Historic Preservation (EHP) Environmental Specialist
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Facilities Unit Leader (Single Type)
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.

records.name: Fatality Management Human Remains Recovery Team Leader
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Finance and Administration Section Chief (Type 1)
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Ground Support Unit Leader
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Housing Task Force Field Coordinator
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Incident Command System Public Information Officer (Type 1)
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Incident/Exercise Evaluator (Type 1)
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.

records.name: Liaison Officer
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Mass Fatality Management Group Supervisor
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Medical Unit Leader
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Missing Persons Group Supervisor
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Operations Section Chief (Type 1)
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Planning Section Chief (Type 1)
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Procurement Unit Leader (Single Type)
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Radiological Emergency Preparedness Program (REPP) Exercise Evaluator (Type 1)
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Radiological Operations Support Specialist (Type 1)
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Resources Unit Leader (Single Type)
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Shelter Resident Services Team Leader (Type 1)
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Supply Unit Leader (Single Type)
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other

records.name: Time Unit Leader (Single Type)
records.overview:
The Position Task Book (PTB) documents the performance criteria a trainee must meet to be certified
for a position within the National Qualification System (NQS). The performance criteria are associated
with core NQS competencies, behaviors and tasks.
A trainee may not work on multiple position type PTBs for a specific position at the same time; for
example, a trainee may not simultaneously work on a Type 1 Incident Commander PTB and a Type 2
Incident Commander PTB. If a position has multiple types, the trainee must, in most cases, qualify at the
lowest type before pursuing the next higher type. For example, before seeking qualification for a Type 1
position, an individual must first qualify at the Type 3 level and then at the Type 2 level.
competencies: An observable, measurable pattern of knowledge, skills, abilities and other
